---
name: Share a suggestion, idea, or task
about: This is a general template for structured input to the project.
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

# Summary
<!-- In one sentence, describe your suggestion, idea, or task. -->


# Background
<!-- Give context or background needed to understand your suggestion, idea, or task. Preferably between two to five sentences. This helps us understand the "why". -->


# Details
<!-- Describe the necessary steps to satisfactorily complete your suggestion, idea, or task. It is preferred to write this as a step-by-step list. However, you can also describe the work needed in two to five sentences. This helps us understand the "how" of your request. -->


# Outcome
<!-- In one sentence, describe the expected outcome or impact of completing your suggestion, idea, or task. -->
